page.content: In Table 1, the dataset includes the following columns: Patient, Chromosome location, Marker, Location start, Location stop, Patient, Mother, Father, and Associated OMIM disease (gene). The first row details Patient 1 with Chromosome location 15q23q24.1, Marker D15S204, Location start 72300758, Location stop 72300879, and values of 123/123 for Patient, 123/125 for Mother, 123/125 for Father, associated with MIM #209900, Bardet-Biedl Syndrome (BBS4). The second row, with no Patient, Chromosome location, or Marker, shows D15S124, Location start 73092468, Location stop 73092572, and values of 104/106 for Patient, 106/106 for Mother, 104/106 for Father, with no associated disease. The third row details Patient 17 with Chromosome location 6q16.3, Marker D6S468, Location start 101630330, Location stop 101630479, and values of 155/159 for Patient, 159/159 for Mother, 155/155 for Father, associated with MIM #611092, Mental retardation (GRIK2). The last rows include various markers with respective values and no associated diseases. In Table 2, the columns are Samples, Men, %, Women, and %. Cervix has 0 Men and 77 Women, Pharynx has 22 Men and 11 Women, Anus has 88 Men and 10 Women, Urethra has 437 Men and 27 Women, Conjunctiva has 1 Man and 0 Women, totaling 548 Men and 125 Women, with percentages indicating their respective distributions.
